title: Finish manifest migrations and runtime schema validation
description: Partially completed. The manifest has been refactored to the new `.pinake/pinake.json` source-of-truth shape, the JSON schema was updated, validation now checks document paths/frontmatter/ADR names, and legacy `Pinake/` folders can be safely copied into `.pinake/docs`. Remaining work: runtime JSON Schema execution, a formal upgrade command, migration history application, and deeper compatibility handling.

checklist.text: Update JSON schema for the new manifest shape
Add safe copy migration from legacy Pinake/ into .pinake/docs
Implement runtime JSON Schema validation and formal upgrade flow
